title: Register Typed Custom Properties Only When Useful
summary: Build and verify css property registration in field manual progress and emphasis property contract through prediction, inspection, explanation, cumulative code, and changed-case transfer.
objectives: Explain css property registration from purpose, behavior, and evidence.
Apply css property registration without discarding earlier valid work.
Diagnose the named misconception in changed content, input, and failure states.

steps.title: 04 · Read the field manual progress and emphasis property contract case · theory
steps.instruction: Checkpoint 4: Which claim preserves css property registration when data, input, and layout change? Scenario: field manual progress and emphasis property contract.
steps.why: Register Typed Custom Properties Only When Useful makes the decision observable and testable. This is checkpoint 4 in field manual progress and emphasis property contract.

content.text: @property can declare a custom property syntax, inheritance behavior, and initial value. Registration enables typed validation, interpolation, and controlled inheritance, but ordinary custom properties need no registration. A compatible unregistered fallback should still make the core experience work, and registration is justified only when typed behavior or non-inheritance solves a real problem. Apply it to field manual progress and emphasis property contract.
